---
title: "Declaration of AI Use"
format: html
suppress-bibliography: true
---

AI tools were used during this project as an aid, not as a source of content. All arguments, analyses, and conclusions are original work by the group members. Sources were identified, read, and verified independently.

Specifically, AI assistance was limited to:

- Brainstorming to stress-test angles and identify counter-arguments, which authors then developed in their own words
- Technical setup and site configuration (Quarto, CSS)
- Editorial tasks: identifying duplicate content across sections, adding cross-references, and fixing citation formatting
- Feedback on clarity and structure, which authors reviewed and fixed based on their own judgement

No AI-generated text appears in the final content. Every section was written, reviewed, and approved by its named author.
